license_options_to_confirm: CC-BY-4.0 for data/figures if authors want a permissive attribution data license

non_negotiable_boundaries: Do not call DEM-derived voxel fields experimental CT.
Do not claim a pressure-calibrated safety limit.
Do not claim a universal critical clogging transition.
Do not claim a public repository DOI/accession until the repository record exists.
